prompt: A polished anime-style full-body illustration of a young Native American woman standing in a sunlit prairie, with a calm, dignified presence and SFW presentation. She has black shoulder-length hair with soft layered strands and side bangs, decorated with 2 feather ornaments and several beaded hair cords in red, blue, and white. Her outfit is a traditional-inspired tan buckskin dress with long fringe in 3 main areas: across the chest, around the waist, and along the skirt hem. The dress includes 4 visible geometric beadwork accents: a patterned neckline trim, a wide beaded belt, a beaded thigh band near the lower skirt, and a matching beaded wrist cuff. She also wears layered beaded necklaces, including 1 large circular medallion pendant and 2 hanging feather-and-bead necklace strands. Place 1 brown-and-white pinto horse standing just behind her right side, clearly visible from head to legs, looking toward the viewer. Set the scene in an open field of tall grass and wildflowers with rolling hills in the distance, under a vivid blue sky with scattered white clouds. Use warm afternoon sunlight, gentle breeze in the hair and fringe, detailed fabric texture, natural skin shading, and a cinematic composition. The image should feel elegant, respectful, and picturesque, with vibrant colors, high detail, clean linework, soft painterly rendering, and a vertical portrait composition.
